suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Broaden the console.error preservation rule from 'Do NOT remove console.error calls from utility files' to 'Do NOT remove console.error calls from any source files'. App.js also contains 6 console.error calls that should be preserved.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature console-cleanup-dead-file correctly preserved 6 console.error calls in App.js, but AGENTS.md only mentions utility files. If future workers only see the 'utility files' wording, they might remove console.error from App.js.
